title: phalaroides arundinacea subsp. japonica
intro: Phalaroides arundinacea subsp. japonica, commonly known as Japanese feather reed grass, is a type of ornamental grass native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phalaroides arundinacea subsp. japonica include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, and it is also used in traditional teas and tinctures.
